skills.title: Make it look designed
skills.blurb: Plan, build and refine interfaces the way a studio would.

commands.name: build
commands.description: Shape, then build a feature end-to-end

commands.name: concept
commands.description: Set the creative direction before building: idea, anti-reference, signature moment

commands.name: research
commands.description: UX research planning, methods selection, persona and journey synthesis

commands.name: ia
commands.description: Information architecture, card sorting, tree testing, navigation patterns

commands.name: journey
commands.description: Generate empathy maps, journey maps, or service blueprints from research

commands.name: document
commands.description: Generate DESIGN.md from existing project code

commands.name: extract
commands.description: Pull reusable tokens and components into a design system

commands.name: handoff
commands.description: Developer handoff spec: layout, tokens, props, states, breakpoints, edge cases, motion, accessibility

commands.name: tokens
commands.description: Audit or create a two-layer CSS token system — primitives + semantic layer + dark mode

commands.name: critique
commands.description: UX design review with heuristic scoring

commands.name: audit
commands.description: Technical quality checks (a11y, perf, responsive, WCAG 2.2, image strategy, forms)

commands.name: amplify
commands.description: Amplify safe or bland designs — bolder typography, stronger color, more presence

commands.name: simplify
commands.description: Reduce visual noise, tone down, strip to essence

commands.name: clarify
commands.description: UX copy, error messages, button labels, empty states

commands.name: launch
commands.description: Production hardening + performance — errors, i18n, edge cases, Core Web Vitals

commands.name: onboard
commands.description: First-run flows, empty states, feature discovery, activation

commands.name: layout
commands.description: Spacing systems, visual rhythm, grid tools

commands.name: charts
commands.description: Accessible data visualization: chart-type choice, a11y grades, non-color fallbacks

commands.name: mobile
commands.description: Phone-specific ergonomics — thumb zone, touch targets, mobile navigation, virtual keyboards, mobile audit

commands.name: delight
commands.description: Micro-interactions, personality in copy, satisfying feedback

commands.name: overdrive
commands.description: View Transitions API, WebGL, scroll-driven animations

commands.name: video
commands.description: Guaranteed-play decorative video: classify, transcode to a canvas-decodable asset (WASM decoder), emit the drop-in component

commands.name: parallax
commands.description: Multi-layer depth, scrollytelling, AI-adaptive motion governance, WCAG 2.2.2 compliance

commands.name: live
commands.description: Interactive variant mode (requires running dev server)

commands.name: ship
commands.description: Finish-and-ship pipeline: polish, defect scan, deterministic audit, hardening, final audit

commands.name: overhaul
commands.description: Audit-driven rework: baseline, triage by remediation route, execute, compare

commands.name: express
commands.description: Zero-to-landing: setup, concept, tokens, plan, build, motion, checks, launch

skills.title: Make it findable
skills.blurb: Get found by Google and by the engines that read your site first.

commands.name: audit
commands.category: Full site SEO audit — crawls up to 500 pages, scores 7 dimensions, outputs ACTION-PLAN.md

commands.name: page
commands.category: Deep single-page analysis — title, meta, H1-H6, schema, images, content quality, score

commands.name: plan
commands.category: Complete SEO strategy — architecture, content pillars, keyword plan, 4-phase roadmap

commands.name: technical
commands.category: Technical audit — robots.txt, sitemaps, Core Web Vitals, mobile, security, JS rendering

commands.name: schema
commands.category: Detect, validate, and generate Schema.org JSON-LD — Organization, Article, Product, etc.

commands.name: content
commands.category: E-E-A-T analysis, readability, keyword density, AI citation readiness

commands.name: geo
commands.category: AI search optimization — Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT, Perplexity, llms.txt, brand signals

commands.name: sitemap
commands.category: XML sitemap validation and generation with industry-specific templates

commands.name: images
commands.category: Image SEO audit — alt text, formats (WebP/AVIF), lazy loading, CLS, LCP

commands.name: local
commands.category: Local SEO — Google Business Profile, NAP consistency, citations, reviews, LocalBusiness schema

commands.name: hreflang
commands.category: Hreflang validation and generation for multilingual and multi-region sites

commands.name: programmatic
commands.category: Programmatic SEO — URL patterns, quality gates (warn 100+, hard stop 500+), deduplication

commands.name: competitor-pages
commands.category: "X vs Y" and "alternatives to X" pages with feature matrices, FAQ schema, conversion hooks

commands.name: cluster
commands.category: Semantic keyword clustering — intent-based grouping, content architecture, gap analysis

commands.name: sxo
commands.category: Search Experience Optimization — intent alignment, page-type matching, persona analysis

commands.name: drift
commands.category: SEO drift monitoring — baseline capture, change detection, history tracking

commands.name: backlinks
commands.category: Backlink profile analysis via free data sources (Moz, Bing, Common Crawl, GSC)

commands.name: ecommerce
commands.category: E-commerce SEO — product pages, category pages, faceted navigation, Product schema

commands.name: report
commands.category: Format any audit output as a client-ready Markdown report or PDF with score gauges

skills.title: Make it pass review
skills.blurb: Named rules, measured values, verdicts. Not vibes.

commands.name: detect
commands.category: Deterministic anti-pattern scan — finds focus rings, clipped dropdowns, pure black/white, tiny touch targets, missing reduced-motion, and more

commands.name: preview
commands.category: Real Chromium screenshot — desktop + mobile viewports, reads back visually, fixes bugs in a loop

commands.name: review
commands.category: Design engineering code review — motion crimes, a11y violations, forbidden patterns, Before/After table with score; plus code robustness (security, performance, correctness)

skills.title: Score the whole thing
skills.blurb: Every specialist at once, reconciled into one scored report.

commands.name: full
commands.category: All 15 sub-agents across SEO, defects, and design; unified report + action plan

commands.name: defects
commands.category: Front-end defect group only (4 inspect sub-agents)

commands.name: quick
commands.category: One representative sub-agent per group for a fast triage

commands.name: checks
commands.category: Deterministic pre-pass only: computed checks plus `SITE-AUDIT.json`, no sub-agents

commands.name: verify
commands.category: Consensus re-check: re-runs the gating dimensions (a11y, interaction, technical) K times and reconciles them by majority vote

commands.name: compare
commands.category: Diff two targets (before/after a site, or A vs B): per-check verdict changes and score deltas

commands.name: learnings
commands.category: Review LEARNINGS.md candidates accumulated by real audits and turn accepted ones into rules, gates, laws or fixtures

commands.name: report
commands.category: Format an existing audit into a client-ready report, a self-contained HTML page, or PDF
